name: Marco Rubio
subject: Building a New American Economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
I'm in Detroit today to address the Detroit
Economic Club and share my vision for a New American Economy for
the 21st Century.
My message will be clear: If we continue to
cling to an outdated tax code, a failing higher education system,
and policies that make it harder for businesses to grow and
opportunities to flourish, then we will be the first generation
in history to pass a weaker America on to our children. But if we
embrace the New American Economy, we will put our people back in
control of their own destinies, and more people will achieve the
American Dream than ever before.
My tax reform plan is pro-growth and
pro-family:

Increase the child tax credit to help
parents invest in the future
Cut taxes for all business to 25%
Allow 100% expensing of every dollar
invested in a company, including new equipment

As a result, experts say we'll grow the
economy by 15%, increase wages by 12.5%, and create almost 2.7
million full-time jobs.
Education is the second critical component of
the New American Economy. Higher education is no longer a mere
option in America; it is now a crucial pathway to the American
Dream for most people. I will do the hard work to modernize our
outdated higher education system. I will expose higher education
to the market forces of choice and competition.
Finally, we have to get Washington out of
the way. Complying with federal regulations has cost our economy
$772 billion since 2008. And Washington adds more rules every
week.
Last week, for example, regulators
published $205 million in new regulatory costs, led by - get this
- a new efficiency standard for ceiling fan light kits. This is
outrageous, it's unnecessary, and I would stop it by instituting
a National Regulatory Budget that limits the costs each agency's
rules can impose.
If we embrace the New American Economy, the
accomplishments of our people will astonish the world, and our
children and theirs will live in a New American Century.
If I'm our president, I will fight for the
New American Economy every single day.
Sincerely,
Marco Rubio
P.S. Click here to read the full text of my
speech.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43513252:18767188900:m:3:1349778030:213483237ADAD17388567D7F47011B50:r

But if we embrace the New American Economy, we will put our people back in control of their own destinies, and more people will achieve the American Dream than ever before. My tax reform plan is pro-growth and pro-family: Increase the child tax credit to help parents invest in the future Cut taxes for all business to 25% Allow 100% expensing of every dollar invested in a company, including new equipment As a result, experts say we'll grow the economy by 15%, increase wages by 12.5%, and create almost 2.7 million full-time jobs. Education is the second critical component of the New American Economy. Higher education is no longer a mere option in America; it is now a crucial pathway to the American Dream for most people. I will do the hard work to modernize our outdated higher education system. I will expose higher education to the market forces of choice and competition. name: President George W. Bush
subject: What this race is about
body:
Dear Friend -

Thanks for taking the time to read my note. I rarely send emails like this, but I wanted to make sure I asked for your support on behalf of my brother, Jeb.

This is a consequential time in our nation's history, and we need a strong leader.

Jeb took on tough challenges as Florida's Governor and delivered results. I know he will do the same as President.

[**That 's why I'm asking you to stand behind him with a gift of $100, $50, or $25.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/glcqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfckwyg_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

My brother will be a tremendous President. He is a proven leader with an optimistic outlook and a clear, conservative agenda for America's future.

He's got a tough road ahead -- take it from someone who's been there. With his strengths and your support, he will succeed. But he needs you, Friend: [**Jeb2016.com/Endorse**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ssjfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgbcjrc_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Laura and I appreciate your consideration and send our best wishes.

Sincerely,

George W. Bush

Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3164&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Will you add your name?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
This is your chance to own a piece of this campaign. | Friend --

I'm so excited to tell you about a new program we're launching this week:

**[For a limited time only, the campaign is going to put the names of every single person who donates on a wall here at headquarters. Chip in today to make sure your name is included.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This idea is a beautiful representation of our team. We're moms and dads, teachers and friends, pastors and neighbors, all working together to move our country forward.

I want to see your name on that wall every time I walk into headquarters. I want to honor you for being part of this team, and I want everyone who walks through those doors to know that your fights are the reasons I'm in this race.

**Chip in today, and we 'll make your name a permanent part of our headquarters:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/get-on-the-wall/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMzMTE1ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTI1NTE3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rick Santorum
subject: WATCH: My plan for system-wide immigration reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=1)
---
Friend --

No issue illustrates the divide between Washington and the rest of the country better than immigration. Democrats and those on the left see favor amnesty, because they see it as a way to gain political power. Establishment Republicans just see it as a way to lower wages and increase profits. But I see it differently.

Today, at 11am, I’ll be sharing my plan for system-wide immigration reform that puts you---hardworking American families---first.

[**If you’re with me, watch this video about my vision for an immigration system that protects American workers from foreign labor that is taking jobs that Americans could otherwise hold, then add your name to say that we need system-wide immigration reform.**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/system_wide_immigration_reform?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=2)

[](http://www.ricksantorum.com/system_wide_immigration_reform?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=3)

Every net new job created since 2000 for people between 18 and 65 is held by someone who wasn’t born in this country. This needs to change.

**Watch the video, then join me in the fight for system-wide immigration reform that puts American workers first.

[http://www.ricksantorum.com/system_wide_immigration_reform](http://www.ricksantorum.com/system_wide_immigration_reform?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=4)

**Thank you,

Rick Santorum[
](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=5)

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=6)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=7).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=8) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1008&n=9).

name: Rand Paul
subject: Happy Birthday, Dad!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

Today is a very special day...

...It's my dad's birthday!

I'm so proud of the example he set in raising a family and always standing up for what he believes in.

**[So I hope you will join me in wishing him the very best on his 80th birthday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878404:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r)**!

Fellow Conservative, my dad was anti-establishment before anyone even knew what that meant.

For decades, he stood up to the Big Government politicians in both parties and fought through their attempts to silence him.

He predicted the financial crisis and he spoke out against assaults on our liberties.

That's why his campaigns inspired a generation of young Americans to join our cause.

So I couldn't be more pleased when he said, "There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they fully share my commitment to Liberty, Austrian economics, small government, and following the Constitution, than my son, Rand Paul."

Fighting business as usual isn't easy.

My dad was often a lonely voice against the Washington Machine's pals in Congress rolling over the Constitution.

But by never compromising in the fight to defend the Bill of Rights, his voice became a chorus as you helped grow our movement, and his campaign caught fire.

Fellow Conservative, **[please join me in wishing my dad a very happy birthday](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878404:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r)**.

And after you add your name, **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878404:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r)** so I can continue to spread the message of Liberty to the voters in the early caucus and primary states.

Thanks,

Rand

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878404:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878405:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878406:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29878407:28646247251:m:1:879035888:B3D0FA3E2074641AFA1BFCBC29698B01:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWPoGBEmNm). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWPoGBEmNm)

name: Claire & Zack, Bernie 2016
subject: Find a Bernie outreach event near you this weekend
body:
#
Dear Bernie Volunteer,
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a46/1316240646/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20")It's been a great few weeks since the big organizing kickoff on July 29th! Supporters in every state are now doing the hard--and fun--work of building our 50-state, nationwide organization.
This weekend, be a part of this incredible movement that's coming together across the country! **[Click here to find a volunteer event near you.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a46/1316240646/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20")**
All across the country, people are organizing flyering and outreach events at farmer's markets, county fairs, festivals, and ball games--and just on busy street corners in local downtowns. Through these vitally important outreach events, thousands of people will hear about Bernie for the first time--and many will sign up to join the movement themselves!
We can't overstate how important these events are. Face-to-face conversations with local people are truly the best way to grow this movement--and also a fun way to build local teams that will do essential election work later on. **[Sign up for an event near you here, or post your own event](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a46/1316240646/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20").**
Some of you are getting creative in your outreach! In Albuquerque, New Mexico, volunteers are going to chalk up sidewalks with pro-Bernie messages and art. On a highway overpass in Appleton, Wisconsin, volunteers will form a "light brigade" with an illuminated message in support of Bernie. People are organizing flash mobs to sing the volunteer-written "Ballad of Bernie" in Traverse City, Michigan. In Bushwick, Brooklyn, volunteers are silkscreening signs, t-shirts, and tote bags with all kinds of Bernie designs--with a DJ providing tunes in the background! And in Chicago, volunteers will be "BERNing up the Beaches" with information on Bernie for beachgoers.
Many, though not all, of these events are happening on Saturday. Over the next few weeks we'll keep making every Saturday a big outreach day for Bernie. The plan is to grow our numbers, and our skills, by doing these fun and easy Saturday outreach events. Then later on, we'll get to voter registration, building neighborhood teams, and preparing to get out the vote.
[**Let 's see how big and fast this thing can grow!**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a46/1316240646/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20")
It's an honor to be working alongside you.
Claire Sandberg & Zack Exley
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a47/1316240646/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150820vol")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a44/1316240646/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a45/1316240646/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a42/1316240646/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23a2/43f17890/5a289e90/621d2a43/1316240646/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Dear Bernie Volunteer, ""It's been a great few weeks since the big organizing kickoff on July 29th! Supporters in every state are now doing the hard--and fun--work of building our 50-state, nationwide organization. This weekend, be a part of this incredible movement that's coming together across the country! "" All across the country, people are organizing flyering and outreach events at farmer's markets, county fairs, festivals, and ball games--and just on busy street corners in local downtowns. Through these vitally important outreach events, thousands of people will hear about Bernie for the first time--and many will sign up to join the movement themselves! We can't overstate how important these events are. Face-to-face conversations with local people are truly the best way to grow this movement--and also a fun way to build local teams that will do essential election work later on. "". Some of you are getting creative in your outreach! In Albuquerque, New Mexico, volunteers are going to chalk up sidewalks with pro-Bernie messages and art. On a highway overpass in Appleton, Wisconsin, volunteers will form a "light brigade" with an illuminated message in support of Bernie. People are organizing flash mobs to sing the volunteer-written "Ballad of Bernie" in Traverse City, Michigan. In Bushwick, Brooklyn, volunteers are silkscreening signs, t-shirts, and tote bags with all kinds of Bernie designs--with a DJ providing tunes in the background! And in Chicago, volunteers will be "BERNing up the Beaches" with information on Bernie for beachgoers. Many, though not all, of these events are happening on Saturday. Over the next few weeks we'll keep making every Saturday a big outreach day for Bernie. The plan is to grow our numbers, and our skills, by doing these fun and easy Saturday outreach events. Then later on, we'll get to voter registration, building neighborhood teams, and preparing to get out the vote. "" It's an honor to be working alongside you. Claire Sandberg & Zack Exley Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: BREAKING: Top race in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends --

_National Journal_ came out with their Senate Rankings. **_We 're in the top ten._**

The Republican-controlled Congress is doing all kinds of damage. They're stalling important progress and launching partisan attacks -- like their crusade against Planned Parenthood.

The fight for control of the Senate is raging on, **and it 's right here in Florida.**

[**August 30th marks one year out from the primary. We need to raise $25,000 before that date in order to fill our Year Out Fund. Can you make a contribution today?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202c/738133e4/3adf62d9/7f977487/1856232289/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150820?refcode=pme150820_m&firstname=&recurring=true")

You've all joined this campaign because you believe in something. Protecting Social Security and Medicare for seniors. Stopping attacks against women's access to health care. Preserving our environment for our kids, starting with the Everglades. Boosting our economy or cutting government waste. Heck, it could be all of those things.

I've always been an independent voice for Florida families. **But I can 't run this race on my own.**

When you're in a top ten race, you need a top notch grassroots network with you. Taking back control of the Senate depends on us winning this race. **We have to do it together.**

[**Help us fill our Year Out Fund before the deadline on August 30th. Give $5 or more today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202c/738133e4/3adf62d9/7f977487/1856232289/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150820?refcode=pme150820_m&firstname=&recurring=true")

Each and every day counts in a race like ours. And every dollar matters.

Thank you for being a part of this.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202c/738133e4/3adf62d9/7f977480/1856232289/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae202c/738133e4/3adf62d9/7f977481/1856232289/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: It will go by in a flash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, We're building a campaign powered by people like you: fired up Democrats who know what it takes to win here in Maryland and take back the Senate from Republican control. And with just 250 days until voters decide which Democrat is best for the job, it's never been more important to prove the strength of our people-powered movement.

**[With 250 days to go, will you pledge $25 today to get our message out and continue to build a winning campaign?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f47/70cdc2ba/47a75b24/3951e55/756270136/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/250pros?refcode=em082015_pros&amount=25.00")**

It's no secret that Republicans are fighting to keep their majority in the Senate, but we can't let that happen. That's why, at this critical stage in our campaign, we need to prove that we have what it takes to win in 2016.

250 days might seem like a long time, but it will go by in a flash.

**[Donate $25 right now and help us continue to build a winning campaign. We have to keep Maryland blue and take back the Senate.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f47/70cdc2ba/47a75b24/3951e55/756270136/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/250pros?refcode=em082015_pros&amount=25.00")**

Thank you,

Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f47/70cdc2ba/47a75b24/3951e52/756270136/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Governor Pataki
subject: Back from Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/5787bbce3d/sc=820eb
Friend,

I recently returned from Iowa, where I spent the last few days
meeting voters and spreading our message across the Hawkeye State.
The response was outstanding.

I had a wonderful time at the Iowa State Fair. In between sampling
the delicious food and serving pork chops, I delivered a speech at
the Des Moines Register Soapbox, which you can watch here -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/dd2b3eb096/327573-3/former-governor-george-pataki-iowa-state-fair .

As I said in Iowa, I might not have a helicopter, but I do have three
tractors. My background as a farmer--as well as my message of limited
government and a stronger America--has helped me connect with
hard-working Iowans and voters across the country.

To keep our campaign's momentum going forward, I need your help. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/2e90b38524/sc=820eb Please contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even
$2,700 today. Your support will help us continue spreading our
message in the crucial early primary states like Iowa and New
Hampshire.

These are serious times. We cannot let this primary process turn into
a reality television event. Instead, we need a candidate who is
principled, tested, and ready to lead this country out of the failed
Obama-Clinton era. I know that I can be that candidate--and that
president.

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/a4a73ba1f6/sc=820eb Please join our campaign with a $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500,
$1,000, or even $2,700 contribution today. Together, we will win this
nomination and take on Hillary Clinton next fall.

Thank you,

George Pataki

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/b5650977c6/sc=820eb

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/dc107ff117

______________________________________________________________________
Click to view this email in a browser
http://hosted.verticalresponse.com/1453469/2df24b5ffc/545562933/ace65cf3c9/

If you no longer wish to receive these emails, please reply to this
message with "Unsubscribe" in the subject line or simply click on the
following link:

http://cts.vresp.com/u?2df24b5ffc/ace65cf3c9/mlpftw

______________________________________________________________________
This message was sent by Governor Pataki

Pataki for President
132 East 43rd Street #614
New York, New York 10017
US
clean_body: - Friend, I recently returned from Iowa, where I spent the last few days meeting voters and spreading our message across the Hawkeye State. The response was outstanding. I had a wonderful time at the Iowa State Fair. In between sampling the delicious food and serving pork chops, I delivered a speech at the Des Moines Register Soapbox, which you can watch here - . As I said in Iowa, I might not have a helicopter, but I do have three tractors. My background as a farmer--as well as my message of limited government and a stronger America--has helped me connect with hard-working Iowans and voters across the country. To keep our campaign's momentum going forward, I need your help. - Please contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 today. Your support will help us continue spreading our message in the crucial early primary states like Iowa and New Hampshire. These are serious times. We cannot let this primary process turn into a reality television event. Instead, we need a candidate who is principled, tested, and ready to lead this country out of the failed Obama-Clinton era. I know that I can be that candidate--and that president. - Please join our campaign with a $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 contribution today. Together, we will win this nomination and take on Hillary Clinton next fall. Thank you, George Pataki - Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc. www.GeorgePataki.com - Click to view this email in a browser

name: Michelle Kwan, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Announcing our team roster!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
You need to be a part of this. | Friend --

Starting this week, we are putting our team roster on the wall at headquarters -- and your name should be on it.

**[The Donor Wall will list the names of every single person who contributes to support Hillary Clinton this week.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

As an Olympic athlete, I know how important your team can be. My team -- my family, my trainers, my fans, my fellow USA teammates -- made everything I achieved possible.

This campaign is no different. Hillary needs her team to stand with her and help us all make history.

**If you’re proud to be a part of this team, make sure to get your name on the Donor Wall:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/get-on-the-wall/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Michelle

Michelle Kwan
Surrogate Outreach Coordinator
Hillary for America

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMzMTgwNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxOTc3MjA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
